name: Trakines
description: Layout mode on screen, full decorated level to OBS via Spout2.

enabled.name: Enable Trakines
enabled.description: Master switch. When on, the play layer shows layout mode on screen while sending the full decorated level to OBS via Spout2.

spout-enabled.name: Enable Spout2 Output
spout-enabled.description: Send the full decorated frame to OBS via a Spout2 sender named 'Trakines'.

spout-sender-name.name: Spout Sender Name
spout-sender-name.description: Name of the Spout2 sender that OBS captures.

layout-bg-color.name: Layout Background Color
layout-bg-color.description: Background color used in on-screen layout mode.

layout-object-color.name: Layout Object Color
layout-object-color.description: Silhouette color used for objects in on-screen layout mode.

layout-in-editor.name: Layout Mode In Editor Playtest
layout-in-editor.description: If off, the editor and its playtest are mirrored 1:1 and layout mode is disabled there.
